title: EverBrite LED Head Torch Battery Powered, Lightweight Headlamp with 5 Lighting Modes, Headlight for Camping, Running, Cycling, Fishing, Hiking, Reading(2 Pack, Blue)
features: 5 Lighting Modes: The headtorch 5 modes: High(white)-- Low(white)-- Red-- Red Strobe-- Green, allowing optimal lighting for any situation. Easily turn off your headlamp by holding down the switch for 2+ seconds and it will remember your last used lighting mode when turned on again

Lightweight Torch & Superior Brightness: The hands-free headlight weighs only 60 g (excluding headband), won't put any pressure on your head. With 300 lumens of power, the headlamp can easily spot a distance of 110 m for a maximum of 4 hours

Adjustable Angle: The lightweight headlamp can be rotated up or down from 0 to 65 degrees to optimize the angle of lighting to adapt to outdoor activities through the night or in low light conditions. The comfortable headband makes it comfortable to wear for a long time

Long Lasting and Widely Use: This head torch can be used in a broad of situations and circumstances. Such as camping, hiking, running, jogging, fishing, hunting, cycling, reading. The red light mode allows you to find prey in night vision and the green lightmode won't disturb other campers in pitch black conditions

Battery Headlamp & Water Resistant IP44: The casing is waterproof and dustproof at IP44 which means it’s protected against heavy splashing, as well as more than 1 mm of dust from entering. It also has the Shock-proof function. The package includes 6 AAA batteries for a better experience
description: Product Description 3 Lighting Colors White/ Red/ Green Power Source Battery Powered 5 Lighting Modes High/ Medium/ Red/ Red Flashing/ Green Light Source LED Add Memory Function: Hold down the switch button more than 2 seconds to turn off the headlamp directly, next time you open it, the headlamp memorizes the last brightness level. This feature addresses the need to use a single specific light.
